laravel_admin_routes.title: Admin API routes scaffold
laravel_admin_routes.prompt: Đảm bảo routes/admin.php có login, me, logout, menus, dashboard/stats. Middleware auth:admin + check.admin.status.

laravel_admin_auth.title: Admin JWT auth
laravel_admin_auth.prompt: Admin guard JWT, login MD5 legacy, Admin model Authenticatable+JWTSubject.

laravel_rbac_service.title: RBAC services
laravel_rbac_service.prompt: AdminPermissionService + AdminMenuService port từ ThinkPHP tw_auth_* và tw_menu.

laravel_dashboard_api.title: Dashboard stats API
laravel_dashboard_api.prompt: GET /api/admin/dashboard/stats — port stats từ IndexController ThinkPHP.

admin_frontend_scaffold.title: Admin Next.js scaffold
admin_frontend_scaffold.prompt: Backend/admin-frontend: login, AppShell, dashboard. Tuân thủ frontend-ui-engineering.md.

docker_db.title: Local Docker MySQL
docker_db.prompt: docker-compose mysql + api, setup-db.sh import dump.

source_download.title: Source từ server
source_download.prompt: Backend/laravel, thinkphp-admin, database dump đã tải về.

users_api.title: Users admin API
users_api.prompt: GET/PUT users, status, coins — port UserController ThinkPHP. Files trong app/Http/Controllers/Admin/.

users_frontend.title: Users list UI
users_frontend.prompt: Backend/admin-frontend: trang /users với DataTable, filter username/status, loading/error/empty states. TanStack Query gọi /api/admin/users.

agents_api.title: Agents API
agents_api.prompt: Port User/agent, setagent, cancelagent từ ThinkPHP sang Laravel Admin API.

admins_api.title: Admin accounts API
admins_api.prompt: Port User/admin, adminEdit, adminStatus — quản lý tw_admin + auth groups.

support_notices.title: Support + Notices API
support_notices.prompt: Port noticelist, sendnotice, online chat từ ThinkPHP UserController.

deposits_api.title: Deposits API
deposits_api.prompt: Port Finance/myzr, adoptzr, rejectzr — nạp tiền approve/reject.

withdrawals_api.title: Withdrawals API
withdrawals_api.prompt: Port Finance/myzc, adopttb, reject — rút tiền approve/reject.

transfers_api.title: Transfers API
transfers_api.prompt: Port Finance/fund — lịch sử chuyển khoản.

finance_frontend.title: Finance UI
finance_frontend.prompt: Admin frontend: /finance/deposits, /finance/withdrawals với approve dialog có lý do bắt buộc.

contract_orders_api.title: Contract orders API
contract_orders_api.prompt: Port Trade/index, gethyorder, setwinloss, settzstatus — lệnh hợp đồng.

contract_settings_api.title: Contract settings API
contract_settings_api.prompt: Port sethy, market, marketEdit — cấu hình spoofing.

staking_api.title: Staking API
staking_api.prompt: Port Issue/index, edit, log từ ThinkPHP.

parity_test.title: Parity testing
parity_test.prompt: So sánh admin mới vs ThinkPHP trên local DB — login, users, finance, trading flows.

deploy_config.title: Deploy config
deploy_config.prompt: Chuẩn bị deploy admin frontend + Laravel admin routes lên server.

remove_thinkphp.title: Remove ThinkPHP
remove_thinkphp.prompt: Sau parity OK: xóa Backend/thinkphp-admin, cập nhật docs, archive trên server.
